On the GeM portal, *single packet bids* require technical and financial documents to be submitted together for immediate evaluation and ranking, suitable for simple, low-value procurement. Conversely, *double packet (two-packet) bids* separate technical and financial bids into two stages, allowing for a thorough technical evaluation before opening financial bids, typically used for complex, high-value purchases
